task_completion.description: OpenOffice Writer is opened and contains IEP data for Mateo Reyes-Contreras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer application window is visible, and the document text includes the student's name 'Mateo Reyes-Contreras'.

task_completion.description: An auto-generated Table of Contents is included at the beginning of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block (typically with a gray background) is visible at the top of the document, listing the sections and page numbers.

task_completion.description: The document includes the required main sections formatted as headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Large, bold text indicating main sections like 'Student Information', 'Present Levels (PLAAFP)', 'Measurable Annual Goals', etc., are visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Tables are used to organize the Annual Goals, Services List, and Accommodations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Grid lines forming tables are visible in the document, containing data related to goals, services, or accommodations.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the footer of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the bottom of the document pages, within the footer margin area, page numbers are visible.

task_completion.description: The document is saved as IEP_Reyes-Contreras_Mateo_2024.odt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window shows 'IEP_Reyes-Contreras_Mateo_2024.odt', or a file manager window shows this file in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenOffice Writer interface being actively used (e.g., menus open, text being typed or formatted), rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent entered the specific assessment data into the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document contains realistic data from the JSON file, such as DIBELS ORF score 52 or WJ-IV scores, rather than generic placeholders.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass GUI interaction for creating the ODT file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands executing a Python script or other CLI tools to generate the ODT file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an IEP for Mateo Reyes-Contreras with 8 specific sections in order: Student Information, Present Levels (PLAAFP), Measurable Annual Goals, Special Education Services, Accommodations, Least Restrictive Environment, Assessment Participation, and IEP Team Signatures. The data includes a DIBELS ORF score of 52 wpm and WJ-IV standard scores (Broad Reading 78, Broad Math 94). The document must have an auto-generated Table of Contents, page numbers in the footer, and use tables for Annual Goals, Services List, and Accommodations.
